title: PJM Incremental and Decremental Bids Day-Ahead Hourly JSON API
description: Hourly virtual day-ahead incremental and decremental bids aggregated by pricing point, hour, and type of bid, released with a 4-month delay. Virtual incremental (INCs) bids are offered to sell into the day-ahead, while decremental (DECs) bids are virtual offers to buy day-ahead power. These transactions are settled in the real-time market.
